title: potentilla norvegica subsp. genuina
intro: Potentilla norvegica subsp. genuina is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family and native to Northern Europe, characterized by its pale pink to white flowers and hairy stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Potentilla norvegica subsp. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
